response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with a strong background in web technologies, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. However, he falls significantly short of the mandatory requirements for this role. He lacks the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, possessing only about 6 months of professional C/C++ experience from 2015. Furthermore, he lacks the required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking, making him a poor fit for this specific position.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (10+ years) at Senior and Staff levels.
Strong background in modern software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD, and system architecture.
Demonstrated exposure to the financial technology sector through his work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Severely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only brief exposure in 2014-2015.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
Missing the required deep domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
